headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump's Hormuz gambit lands with a whimper
summary: Markets appear to have made their peace with the stalled talks, with oil barely moving despite another oil output quota hike by the OPEC+ members.

headline: AI Capex Boom Drives Hottest ETF Trade Into Semiconductors, Not Crypto
summary: Retail money pours into semiconductor ETFs as the AI capex supercycle outshines crypto funds in 2026's hottest ETF trade.

headline: Is NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is NVDA a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on NVIDIA Corporation on Long-term Investing’s Substack by Sanjiv. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on NVDA. NVIDIA Corporation’s share was trading at $199.64 as of April 23rd. NVDA’s trailing and forward P/E were 40.74 and 24.51 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Banks seek to offload risk to avoid ‘choking’ on data centre debt
summary: Banks are hunting for new ways to offload risks tied to a glut of data centre debt as the race to build AI infrastructure stretches financing...

headline: Oracle’s Defense AI Win Highlights Government Cloud Role And Valuation Gap
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has been selected by the U.S. Department of Defense as one of eight technology partners to deliver advanced AI tools for classified military networks. The award places Oracle in a small group of major cloud and AI providers trusted with sensitive defense-related AI workloads. The contract is focused on providing AI infrastructure and software to support secure, classified military operations. For investors watching NYSE:ORCL, this development highlights Oracle's role in...
